description: Operate a Shopify store with Admin GraphQL commands, local sync, analytics, bulk exports, and ShopifyQL reporting.

novel_features.name: Sales Funnel from ShopifyQL
novel_features.description: Three-stage funnel over N days (sessions -> checkouts -> orders) computed via ShopifyQL with real response columns.

novel_features.name: Raw ShopifyQL Query
novel_features.description: Run an arbitrary ShopifyQL query string and stream the JSON response.

novel_features.name: Daily Sessions
novel_features.description: Online Store sessions per day for the last N days.

novel_features.name: Conversion Rate
novel_features.description: Online Store conversion rate over the last N days, optionally per-day.

novel_features.name: Daily Revenue Breakdown
novel_features.description: Daily revenue, refunds, net, and order count over the last N days from the local orders store.

novel_features.name: Channel Mix
novel_features.description: Revenue by sourceName (web, draft_order, pos, channel id) over the last N days.

novel_features.name: Tag-Match Impact
novel_features.description: Compare revenue for tag-matched orders against the rest over the last N days.

novel_features.name: Attach Rate
novel_features.description: Percent of orders containing --anchor that also contain --attached, by case-insensitive line-item title substring.

novel_features.name: Repeat-Purchase Lifecycle
novel_features.description: Repeat-purchase distribution and median time-between-orders over the last N days.

novel_features.name: Current Bulk Operation
novel_features.description: Show the currently running or most recent Shopify bulk operation.

novel_features.name: Run Bulk Query
novel_features.description: Start a Shopify bulk operation from a GraphQL query string or file.

novel_features.name: Order Tag Mutation
novel_features.description: Add or remove tags on a Shopify order by id or name.

novel_features.name: Customer Tag Mutation
novel_features.description: Add or remove tags on a Shopify customer by id.

novel_features.name: Auth Audit
novel_features.description: Audit OAuth client_credentials setup and access-token freshness.

novel_features.name: Store Daily Brief
novel_features.description: Executive store brief with revenue, top products, risk checks, and suggested next actions from the local mirror.

novel_features.name: Store Health Audit
novel_features.description: Score store health from refunds, fulfillment risk, shipping anomalies, and dead stock.

novel_features.name: Growth Campaign Brief
novel_features.description: Generate a data-backed campaign brief from top products, VIPs, and winback opportunities.

novel_features.name: Winback Candidates
novel_features.description: Rank idle customers by lifetime value and suggest winback angles.

novel_features.name: VIP Segments
novel_features.description: Segment high-value customers by spend, frequency, recency, and recommended action.

novel_features.name: Fulfillment Risk Queue
novel_features.description: Find open fulfillment orders older than a threshold and classify risk.

novel_features.name: Shipping Anomalies
novel_features.description: Find orders with free, missing, or unusually high shipping charges using synced shippingLines.

novel_features.name: Bundle Opportunities
novel_features.description: Suggest bundles from co-purchase confidence and lift.

novel_features.name: Dead Stock Actions
novel_features.description: Turn inventory with no recent sales into markdown or bundle actions.

novel_features.name: Product Launch Brief
novel_features.description: Build a launch/relaunch brief from product sales, inventory, and merchandising evidence.

catalog_description: Operate a Shopify store with Admin GraphQL commands, local sync, analytics, bulk exports, and ShopifyQL reporting.
